sourceRepo: foundryvtt-swse-main (22).zip plus Phase 10-15 changed-file patches applied before this pass
policyNotes: Tech Specialist and Force Regimen Mastery are intentionally deferred because they require dedicated UI/pickers.
Starship Designer and Cybernetic Surgery are punted to GM/player handling.
Linguist is treated as implemented through the chargen/progression language step.
Positioning-heavy or table-state-heavy effects are stored as explicit metadata, not fake static bonuses.
engineSupportAdded: CombatOptionResolver: attack options can require a selected-choice match from another feat, used for Critical Strike / Autofire Sweep / Autofire Assault with Weapon Focus.
SkillFeatResolver: skill bonuses can require target type and selected target choice, used for Droid Focus.
SkillFeatResolver: abilityDelta value formula supports rules such as Mind of Reason using Wisdom instead of Intelligence when better.

touchedFeats.name: Grazing Shot
touchedFeats.summary: Grazing Shot: after a successful ranged attack, make a second attack against a nearby line-of-sight target and split damage only if the second attack hits.

touchedFeats.name: Force Regimen Mastery
touchedFeats.summary: Force Regimen Mastery is intentionally deferred; it requires dedicated Force regimen UI/picker work.

touchedFeats.name: Disturbing Presence
touchedFeats.summary: Disturbing Presence: DC 15 Deception lets you move through threatened/fighting spaces without provoking; spaces cost double movement.

touchedFeats.name: Tactical Advantage
touchedFeats.summary: Tactical Advantage: damaging with an attack of opportunity lets you move 1 square without provoking.

touchedFeats.name: Hideous Visage
touchedFeats.summary: Hideous Visage: once per encounter swift Deception vs Will pushes the target and gives it -1 attack until your next turn.

touchedFeats.name: Improved Bantha Rush
touchedFeats.summary: Improved Bantha Rush: Bantha Rush push distance increases by half Strength modifier, minimum 2 squares total.

touchedFeats.name: Tech Specialist
touchedFeats.summary: Tech Specialist is intentionally deferred; it requires a dedicated customization UI/picker and should not be represented by fake passive bonuses.

touchedFeats.name: Duck and Cover
touchedFeats.summary: Duck and Cover: when you avoid an area attack, dive for cover as a reaction/positioning rider.

touchedFeats.name: Stay Up
touchedFeats.summary: Stay Up: once per encounter take half damage from an attack and move -1 step on the Condition Track.

touchedFeats.name: Opportunistic Retreat
touchedFeats.summary: Opportunistic Retreat: forgo an Attack of Opportunity to move at half speed.

touchedFeats.name: Improved Grapple
touchedFeats.summary: Improved Grapple: +5 on grapple checks and suppresses the normal attack of opportunity for initiating a grapple.

touchedFeats.name: Improved Sleight of Hand
touchedFeats.summary: Improved Sleight of Hand: use Deception to aid Stealth for sleight of hand and use Stealth to draw/pass hidden objects.

touchedFeats.name: Linguist
touchedFeats.summary: Linguist is treated as implemented through the chargen/progression language step rather than feat modifier metadata.

touchedFeats.name: Experienced Medic
touchedFeats.summary: Experienced Medic: perform surgery on multiple creatures at the same time.

touchedFeats.name: Knife Trick
touchedFeats.summary: Knife Trick: concealed weapon threatens squares and can be drawn for an Attack of Opportunity.

touchedFeats.name: Turn and Burn
touchedFeats.summary: Turn and Burn: improves Withdraw movement through threatened squares.

touchedFeats.name: Impulsive Flight
touchedFeats.summary: Impulsive Flight: withdraw faster; movement validation remains action metadata.

touchedFeats.name: Demoralizing Strike
touchedFeats.summary: Demoralizing Strike: after damaging with an attack of opportunity, make a free Persuasion check to Intimidate.

touchedFeats.name: Scavenger
touchedFeats.summary: Scavenger: one-hour Perception-based scavenging produces construction materials equal to check result x 30 credits.

touchedFeats.name: Returning Bug
touchedFeats.summary: Returning Bug: missed Razor Bug or Thud Bug attacks return the weapon to hand.

touchedFeats.name: Biotech Surgery
touchedFeats.summary: Biotech Surgery: enables Treat Injury installation of Bio-Implants; self-installation penalty and Surgical Expertise timing are metadata.

touchedFeats.name: Overwhelming Attack
touchedFeats.summary: Overwhelming Attack: two swift actions; target takes -5 on rolls/checks to negate your next attack this round.

touchedFeats.name: Multi-Grab
touchedFeats.summary: Multi-Grab: standard action to make separate Grab attacks against two adjacent targets while both hands are empty.

touchedFeats.name: Stava Training
touchedFeats.summary: Stava Training: treat Grab/Grapple as one size larger and add an immediate Grab rider after a successful unarmed charge.

touchedFeats.name: Bantha Herder
touchedFeats.summary: Bantha Herder: ranged damage can push Large-or-smaller targets if the attack total also equals/exceeds Will Defense.

touchedFeats.name: Mind of Reason
touchedFeats.summary: Mind of Reason: use Wisdom instead of Intelligence for Intelligence-based skill checks when better.

touchedFeats.name: Unswerving Resolve
touchedFeats.summary: Unswerving Resolve: gain a temporary Force Point when a Fear or Mind-Affecting effect fails to affect you.

touchedFeats.name: Feat of Strength
touchedFeats.summary: Feat of Strength: once per encounter Take 10 or Take 20 on one Strength check or Strength-related skill check.

touchedFeats.name: Flash and Clear
touchedFeats.summary: Flash and Clear: damaging with a Burst or Splash weapon grants concealment against that target until your next turn.

touchedFeats.name: Cybernetic Surgery
touchedFeats.summary: Cybernetic Surgery is punted to GM/player handling; cybernetic installation remains a table/workbench procedure.

touchedFeats.name: Suppression Fire
touchedFeats.summary: Suppression Fire: Aid Another suppression rider against Will Defense; battlefield cover behavior is preserved as metadata, not automated.

touchedFeats.name: Long Haft Strike
touchedFeats.summary: Long Haft Strike: Lightsaber Pike or Long-Handle Lightsaber can be treated as a double weapon.

touchedFeats.name: Hew
touchedFeats.summary: Hew: when Power Attack is used, ignore damage reduction equal to BAB. Damage reduction application remains a damage-resolution hook.

touchedFeats.name: Mechanical Martial Arts
touchedFeats.summary: Mechanical Martial Arts: unarmed damage imposes a melee attack/damage penalty on the target until the start of your next turn.

touchedFeats.name: Unleashed
touchedFeats.summary: Unleashed: unlocks Unleashed Abilities that spend Destiny Points; Force Unleashed abilities still require Force Sensitivity.

touchedFeats.name: Increased Agility
touchedFeats.summary: Increased Agility: +2 squares to Climb Speed, Swim Speed, and Jump distance; retain Dex bonus while climbing.

touchedFeats.name: Autofire Assault
touchedFeats.summary: Autofire Assault: sustained autofire with a Weapon Focus weapon reduces the autofire penalty and adds +1 weapon die.

touchedFeats.name: Hobbling Strike
touchedFeats.summary: Hobbling Strike: trade Sneak Attack/Rapid Shot/Rapid Strike extra damage to reduce target speed by 1 square until encounter end.

touchedFeats.name: Implant Training
touchedFeats.summary: Implant Training: suppresses the extra implant condition-track step and implant Will Defense penalty.

touchedFeats.name: Droid Shield Mastery
touchedFeats.summary: Droid Shield Mastery: automatically succeed to restore SR by 5 and recharge shields using two swift actions.

touchedFeats.name: Vehicle Systems Expertise
touchedFeats.summary: Vehicle Systems Expertise: Recharge Shields or Reroute Power with two swift actions, with once/encounter DC 30 one-swift option.

touchedFeats.name: Critical Strike
touchedFeats.summary: Critical Strike: spend two swift actions to improve the critical threat of a melee attack with a Weapon Focus weapon.

touchedFeats.name: Pistoleer
touchedFeats.summary: Pistoleer: pistol-family benefits are explicit metadata; Hold-Out Blaster early-combat attack bonus is roll-context supported.

touchedFeats.name: Fleet-Footed
touchedFeats.summary: Fleet-Footed: when moving both before and after a Running Attack, speed increases by 2 squares until end of turn.

touchedFeats.name: Starship Designer
touchedFeats.summary: Starship Designer is punted to GM/player handling; no automatic implementation should be attempted in feat metadata.

touchedFeats.name: Darkness Dweller
touchedFeats.summary: Darkness Dweller: nearby enemies take a Stealth penalty; proximity is table/token context and not a static skill modifier.

touchedFeats.name: Imperceptible Liar
touchedFeats.summary: Imperceptible Liar: increase the Force Point die type when adding Force Points to Deception checks.

touchedFeats.name: Droid Focus
touchedFeats.summary: Droid Focus: selected droid-degree context gives +1 on listed skills and +1 defenses against that droid degree.

touchedFeats.name: Surgical Expertise
touchedFeats.summary: Surgical Expertise: surgery takes 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.

touchedFeats.name: Artillery Shot
touchedFeats.summary: Artillery Shot: proficient Burst/Splash weapon attacks beyond point-blank affect two additional adjacent squares.

touchedFeats.name: Autofire Sweep
touchedFeats.summary: Autofire Sweep: Weapon Focus autofire attack can target all creatures in a 6-square cone from a visible point in point-blank range.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Skill Challenge: Catastrophic Avoidance
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Catastrophic Failures in a Skill Challenge occur less frequently, and with milder results.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Impersonate
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Shapeshift to impersonate a specific person.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Dreadful Countenance
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Marked as Sith, your appearance inspires awe, dread, and fear in all who view it.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Signature Device
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Install two Traits.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Justice Seeker
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Gain a bonus to damage rolls against those who harm your allies.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Hasty Modification
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Swap one Trait for another Trait.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Destructive Force
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Deal damage to adjacent targets when you damage objects and Vehicles.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Maniacal Charge
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Intimidate your enemies when Charging, preventing adjacent characters from making Attacks of Opportunity and denying your target its Dexterity bonus.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Blaster Barrage
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Automatically Aid Another when using Autofire attacks.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Stand Tall
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: When you take damage, nearby allies attack your attacker.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Sith Military Training
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Upon debilitating an opponent, you can cause other opponents to lose heart.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Leader of Droids
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Allied Droids benefit from your beneficial Mind-Affecting effects.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Wicked Strike
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Gain extra attack on a second target upon damaging the first target.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Distracting Droid
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Attempt to deny enemies within 6 squares their next Move Action, with a chance to make enemies Flat-Footed.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Crossfire
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Redirect missed attacks against Soft Cover.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Acrobatic Ally
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Hoist or toss an ally of your size or smaller up to 2 squares.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Imperial Military Training
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Negate one Mind-Affecting effect per encounter.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Disarming Charm
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Gain a bonus to Skill Checks on targets whose Attitude you have improved.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Mounted Defense
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: You are able to react to incoming attacks, using you Mount or Speeder Bike to absorb attacks against you.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Fringe Benefits
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Reduce the cost multiplier of goods bought on the Black Market.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: A Few Maneuvers
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: You can weave, juke, and roll to avoid enemy fire in the thick of combat.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Mon Calamari Shipwright
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Reroute Power more quickly and without the risk of failure.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Biotech Specialist
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Make custom modifications to Yuuzhan Vong Biotech.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Knock Heads
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: You may knock two opponents' heads together after a successful Multi-Grab.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Coordinated Barrage
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Allow an ally to deal more damage when you aid their attack.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Hyperblazer
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Cut all calculation time and Use Computer penalties by half when making Use Computer checks for Astrogation in the Hyperspace tangle. Reduce Hyperspace mapping time by half.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Multi-Targeting
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: You can spread your Aim action across multiple consecutive rounds.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Momentum Strike
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: You know how to put the weight of your momentum into attacks while riding a Mount or Speeder Bike.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Swap a Trained Skill for an Untrained Skill on the fly.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Officer Candidacy Training
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Gain a bonus to your Rank and Privilege Score.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Tactical Genius
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: You are a master at using multiple starship tactics over the course of long space combats.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Skill Challenge: Last Resort
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Reroll a third failed Skill Check during a Skill Challenge, keeping the better result.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Friends in Low Places
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Reduce Black Market cost multiplier for Restricted Items by 1.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Grab Back
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: As a Reaction, make a Grab or Grapple attack following a failed Grab or Grapple attack made against you.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Shield Surge
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Trade Vehicle's Shield Rating for damage taken.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Trample
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: When using the Mounted Charge Action, attack enemies between you and your target.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Meat Shield
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Gain Cover bonus equal to opponent's Cover bonus.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Sensor Link
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Share sensor data instantly with an ally.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Skill Challenge: Recovery
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Treat a Skill Challenge as if it had the Recovery effect.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Brink of Death
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Attacks that would kill your enemy reduces them to 0 Hit Points instead.

remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.name: Resilient Talent
remainingActiveNonPuntedBacklog.shortSummary: Once per day, you may gain the benefit of any talent from a class you have levels in for 1 minute.

deferredMajorUi.name: Force Regimen Mastery
deferredMajorUi.shortSummary: Learn a number of Force Regimens equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1).

deferredMajorUi.name: Tech Specialist
deferredMajorUi.shortSummary: You can make custom modifications to Armor, Weapons, Vehicles, Droids, and Devices.

puntedToGmPlayer.name: Cybernetic Surgery
puntedToGmPlayer.shortSummary: Install a Cybernetic Prosthesis onto a living being.

puntedToGmPlayer.name: Starship Designer
puntedToGmPlayer.shortSummary: You are trained to design (and redesign) Starships.

implementedElsewhere.name: Linguist
implementedElsewhere.shortSummary: Gain bonus Languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1).
